items.title: The Cavs keep spinning the wing carousel — does Jaylon Tyson finally stop it?
items.author: Cleveland.com
items.body_excerpt: The Cavs keep spinning the wing carousel — does Jaylon Tyson finally stop it? Cleveland.com

items.title: That's a tough finish by Jaylon Tyson through the contact from Mitchell Robinson. Maks the freebie, adn the Cavs have the Knick lead down to four, 43-39, with 7:22 to go in the first half.
items.author: Dan Devine
